name: AF - Oppa, Saranghae (2023)
plot:
The story follows Han Ji-eun, a young South Korean freelance translator struggling with mounting family debts. Feeling overwhelmed, she decides to take a break and travel to Morocco after landing an unexpected gig as a translator for an international project.

In Morocco, she unexpectedly crosses paths with Young Suk-ho, a top Korean celebrity shooting his latest film. Through a series of comedic mishaps, Ji-eun ends up working as Suk-ho’s personal translator. Despite their vastly different worlds, the two find themselves drawn to each other in ways they never imagined.

As Ji-eun navigates Suk-ho’s high-profile life and he learns to appreciate her grounded perspective, their bond deepens, leading to a heartwarming romance with plenty of misunderstandings, culture clashes, and laugh-out-loud moments.
cast:
•	Han Ji-eun: Kim Sejeong – A relatable and charming translator trying to find her place in the world.
	•	Young Suk-ho: Lee Min-ho – A charismatic yet guarded movie star whose fame hides his insecurities.
	•	Supporting Roles:
	•	Park Soo-jin (Hwang In-yeop): Suk-ho’s ambitious manager who constantly clashes with Ji-eun.
	•	Noura El-Mansouri (Mina El Hammani): Ji-eun’s Moroccan friend who helps her adapt to life abroad.
	•	Kang Hae-jin (Seo Ye-ji): Suk-ho’s glamorous ex-girlfriend who stirs trouble.

cast: Richard van der Westhuizen, Susanne Beyers, Lizz Meiring, Adriana Faling.

plot: Hartland vertel die storie van 'n uitgebreide Afrikaner-familie in Suid-Afrika en wys die gevolge van die keuses wat elkeen elke dag maak, asook die uitwerking daarvan op die res van die familie.
cast: Wilna Snyman, Brümilda van Rensburg, Johan Scholtz, Andre Odendaal, Franci Swanepoel, David Rees, Hanli Rolfes, Anrich Herbst

name: AF - Hester & Ester Bester (2007) (ZA)
plot: 'n Suid-Afrikaanse, Afrikaanstalige televisie-sitkom wat die verhaal vertel van twee susters van Bloemfontein wat by hul tante Bessie intrek en - saam met hul vriendin Trompie - sonder goeie rede chaos veroorsaak.
cast: Lizz Meiring, Karen Wessels, Marisa Drummond, Izak Taljaard

name: AF - My Sassy Girl (2008) (JP)
cast: 草彅剛, 田中麗奈, 松下奈緒, 谷原章介, 上川隆也, Emi Suzuki, 市毛良枝, May Tanaka

name: AF - Shanty Town (NG)
plot: A group of courtesans attempts to escape the grasp of a notorious kingpin – but political corruption and blood ties make freedom a near-impossible goal.
cast: Richard Mofe-Damijo, Sola Sobowale, Nse Ikpe-Etim, Lilian Afegbai, Toyin Abraham, Ini Edo, Ali Nuhu, Chidi Mokeme

name: AF - Spinners
plot: The series focuses on Ethan's internal and external struggles as he balances his love for extreme motorsport with the harsh realities of gang culture. His journey is filled with adrenaline-pumping car action and tense gang conflicts, portraying the struggles of youth in marginalized communities.
cast:
Cantona James plays Ethan, the protagonist searching for a way out of gang life.
Brendon Daniels portrays Hercules, a figure of authority within the gang world.
Dillon Windvogel acts as Shane, a friend who works closely with Ethan in the automotive world

name: AF - Sue Thomas: F.B.Eye (2002) (US)
cast: Deanne Bray, Yannick Bisson, Rick Peters, Marc Gomes, Enuka Okuma, Ted Atherton, Tara Samuel
director: Dave Alan Johnson, Gary R. Johnson

name: AF - Tyler Perry's Zatima (US)
plot: Zac and Fatima take a huge step to strengthen their bond, but new friends and past actions interfere with their blossoming relationship.
cast: Jasmin Brown

name: AF - Vallei van Sluiers (2010) (ZA)
cast: Nico Panagio, Sophia Passerini, Christian Kain, Stian Bam, Marko van der Colff, Michele Burgers, Jana Fischer, André Rossouw

name: AF - Vir beter of baie beter
plot: Boetie, the head of the Botha household, struggles to support his family after losing his job. He is married to Barbara (Belinda Parkin), and they have two homeschooled children: Barbie (Michelle du Plessis) and Buks (Luan Jacobs). Boetie's sister Bokkie (Lelia Etsebeth), a flight attendant for a low-budget airline, also lives with them rent-free. The show humorously portrays their daily challenges, including Boetie's attempts to regain his status as his wife's "knight in shining armor."
cast:
Wynand Vollenstee as Boetie Botha
Belinda Parkin as Barbara Botha
Michelle du Plessis as Barbie Botha
Luan Jacobs as Buks Botha
Lelia Etsebeth as Bokkie Botha
Alvin Bruinders as Colin, Boetie's best friend and neighbor
The series is well-known for its lighthearted comedy and family-centric storytelling​

name: AF - Vyfster (1982)
plot: The series is set in Pretoria Central Prison, South Africa, and follows the lives of inmates and their interactions with the wardens. The central figure is Peter Andrew "Skollie" Williams, a daring and resourceful prisoner known for his repeated escape attempts. The show explores themes of justice, loyalty, power dynamics, and human resilience, as both inmates and authorities navigate the harsh realities of prison life. Relationships, betrayals, and moral dilemmas form the crux of the narrative. The series also critiques societal issues of the time and blends fictional storytelling with a semi-documentary style for authenticity.
cast:
George Ballot as Peter Andrew "Skollie" Williams
Marius Weyers as Tiger Blom
Paul Eilers as Polka
Patrick Mynhardt as Pappa
Cathy Beard as Wilma le Roux
Danie Joubert as Hendrik le Roux
Carel Trichardt as Kolonel
Robin Smith as Gabba
Pierre Knoessen as Gerrie Prinsloo
The series was acclaimed for its gripping portrayal of prison life and was followed by a feature film, Vyfster: Die Slot, which concluded the storyline

name: AF - Wolfe (GB)
plot: The adventures of Professor Wolfe Kinteh, a crime scene investigator in the north of England.
cast: Babou Ceesay, Natalia Tena, Amanda Abbington, Adam Long, Shaniqua Okwok, Christine Tremarco, Talitha Wing, Naomi Yang

name: AF - Young, Famous & African (ZA)
plot: This reality series follows a crew of famed, affluent stars as they work and play, flirt and feud in Johannesburg, South Africa. This all-African reality series includes actor Khanyi Mbau, musician Diamond Platnumz and rapper Nadia Nakai.
